<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Voice\Webhook; use DateTimeImmutable; use Exception; class Error { protected ?string $conversationUuid = null; protected ?string $reason = null; protected ?DateTimeImmutable $timestamp = null; /** * @throws Exception */ public function __construct(array $event) { $this->conversationUuid = $event['conversation_uuid']; $this->reason = $event['reason']; $this->timestamp = new DateTimeImmutable($event['timestamp']); } public function getConversationUuid(): string { return $this->conversationUuid; } public function getReason(): string { return $this->reason; } public function getTimestamp(): DateTimeImmutable { return $this->timestamp; } }
